seoTitle: Renmark vs Renmark South — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Renmark and Renmark South. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Renmark vs Renmark South: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Renmark and Renmark South.
heading: Renmark vs Renmark South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Renmark, South Australia and Renmark South, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Renmark South has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Renmark (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Renmark or Renmark South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Renmark has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Renmark South scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Renmark scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Renmark South scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Renmark or Renmark South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Renmark South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
